chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 621. Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
##### § 621.401 — Definition

In this subchapter, “weight enforcement officer” means:

    (1) a license and weight inspector of the Department of Public Safety;

    (2) a highway patrol officer;

    (3) a sheriff or sheriff’s deputy;

    (4) a municipal police officer in a municipality with a population of:

        (A) 100,000 or more; or

        (B) 74,000 or more in a county with a population of more than 1.5 million;

    (5) a police officer certified under Section 644.101 (Certification of Certain Peace Officers) ; or

    (6) a constable or deputy constable designated under Section 621.4015 (Designation by Commissioners Court) .

*Acts 2005, 79th Leg., Ch. 931 (H.B.602), Sec. 1, eff. June 18, 2005.*
